title: SessionType
description: Implementation of the 'SessionType' model. SessionType contains information about the session types in a business.

Type.description: Contains the class description session type. Possible values are: * All * Class * Enrollment * Appointment * Resource * Media * Arrival

DefaultTimeLength.description: The default amount of time that a session of this type typically lasts.

StaffTimeLength.description: The amount of time that a session of this type will last for a specific Staff (when applicable.)

Name.description: The name of this session type.

OnlineDescription.description: The online description associated with the appointment.
OnlineDescription.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

NumDeducted.description: The number of sessions that this session type deducts from the pricing option used to pay for this type of session.

ProgramId.description: This session type’s service category ID.

AvailableForAddOn.description: This session type’s Add On Flag.
